prompt: Write four absurd but coherent sentences in the voice of a confused medieval chronicler who has been hired to document the Q3 results of a modern SaaS company.
response: In this quarter, the realm of the cloud hath seen a veritable surge in revenue, a growth as swift as a charging unicorn! The lords of finance reporteth that the gold in our coffers hath increased by 25%, a treasure trove beyond our expectations. Yet, the number of knights in our employ, the customers as we call them, hath remained steady as a castle upon the hill, with naught but a mere 3% growth, a conundrum that bewildereth my quill. Verily, the success of the kingdom's campaigns lies in the retention of its faithful subjects, for the annual contract renewals are as strong as ever, though the cost to acquire new knights is as unpredictable as a dragon's flight.
